languages.text: "Преклоните колени, ибо перед вами {name} фон Валанциус, держатель Торгового Патента и Помазанни{mf|к|ца} Бога-Императора".
"Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Преклоните колени, ибо перед вами {name} фон Валанциус, держатель Торгового Патента и Помазанни{mf|к|ца} Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and Anointed of the God-Emperor."
"Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and Anointed of the God-Emperor."
"Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

"Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "Kniet nieder vor {name} von Valancius, {mf|Träger|Trägerin} des Handelsbriefs und {mf|Gesalbter|Gesalbte} des Gottimperators."
languages.original_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Kniet nieder vor {name} von Valancius, {mf|Träger|Trägerin} des Handelsbriefs und {mf|Gesalbter|Gesalbte} des Gottimperators."

languages.text: « À genoux, vous êtes en présence de {name} von Valancius, {mf|détenteur|détentrice} de la lettre de marque et {mf|élu|élue} de l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « À genoux, vous êtes en présence de {name} von Valancius, {mf|détenteur|détentrice} de la lettre de marque et {mf|élu|élue} de l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: «Arrodíllense ante {name} von Valancius, portador{mf||a} de la Patente de Comercio y ungid{mf|o|a} del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Arrodíllense ante {name} von Valancius, portador{mf||a} de la Patente de Comercio y ungid{mf|o|a} del Dios Emperador».

languages.text: "Diz çökün. Karşınızda Ticaret Ruhsatnamesi Hamili ve Tanrı İmparator'un Seçilmişi {name} von Valancius duruyor."
languages.original_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Diz çökün. Karşınızda Ticaret Ruhsatnamesi Hamili ve Tanrı İmparator'un Seçilmişi {name} von Valancius duruyor."

languages.text: “跪下。此刻站在你们面前的是{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，贸易授状的持有者，神皇的神选者。”
languages.original_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “跪下。此刻站在你们面前的是{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，贸易授状的持有者，神皇的神选者。”

languages.text: 「跪れ、汝の前に立つのはヴァランシウス家の{名前}、貿易証書を携え、神皇帝に選ばれた者なり」
languages.original_text: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 「跪れ、汝の前に立つのはヴァランシウス家の{名前}、貿易証書を携え、神皇帝に選ばれた者なり」
